headlines.title: Watch full highlights as England ride luck in fierce Miami heat
headlines.description: Jude Bellingham scores twice, including an extra-time winner, as England come from behind to beat Norway 2-1 in Miami to reach the World Cup semi-finals.

headlines.title: Man arrested in South Yorkshire on suspicion of Ann Widdecombe murder
headlines.description: A 28-year-old white British national has been arrested in South Yorkshire, police say.

headlines.title: US Senator and close Trump ally Lindsey Graham dies after 'brief and sudden illness'
headlines.description: The influential politician had just returned from Kyiv, where he met Ukraine's President Volodymyr Zelensky on Friday.

headlines.title: US launches fresh strikes as Iran closes Strait of Hormuz
headlines.description: The strikes follow an attack on a Cyprus -flagged vessel travelling through the critical waterway.

headlines.title: We are living fewer years in good health: Is the NHS part of the problem?
headlines.description: What is driving the UK's fall in healthy life expectancy?

headlines.title: 'Exceptional' wildfire risk for parts of UK as heat health alerts issued
headlines.description: The warnings come as parts of the UK are set to enter their second week of temperatures above the heatwave threshold.

headlines.title: Tuchel angry at 'lucky' England - but Bellingham defends players
headlines.description: England head coach Thomas Tuchel is praised by former England players for saying his players "got lucky" in World Cup quarter-final win over Norway - but match-winner Jude Bellingham disagrees.

headlines.title: 'The perfect football song': Why England fans (like Beckham) and players love Wonderwall
headlines.description: David Beckham joined in with the latest Oasis singalong, following England's World Cup win in Miami.

headlines.title: Bellingham reaching heights of World Cup legends with Messi next
headlines.description: Jude Bellingham again dazzles England and the World Cup with his brilliance, matching some records of the all-time greats.

headlines.title: Watch fans react to every goal of England v Norway
headlines.description: The quarter-final of the World Cup saw the two teams face off in Miami, cheered on by fans back home.

headlines.title: 'We should all be excited' - Messi set for first England meeting
headlines.description: Lionel Messi is set for his first match against England after Argentina beat Switzerland in the World Cup quarter-finals.

headlines.title: T. rex could become most expensive fossil ever - but it's a ​problem for scientists
headlines.description: A 67 million-year-old Tyrannosaurus rex will go on sale in New York with a pre-sale value of $30m.

headlines.title: Ice on testicles and donating blood - the myths sold to men trying to boost their sperm
headlines.description: With men’s fertility increasingly in the spotlight, we meet the men using unproven “hacks” promoted by influencers to up their sperm counts.

headlines.title: Why young wine drinkers are breaking the 'room temperature' red rule
headlines.description: Drinking a red at room temperature only is a common belief but the heatwave might have changed that.

headlines.title: Wimbledon vs World Cup: Who wore their look best?
headlines.description: Wimbledon and the World Cup are known for high stakes and high fashion. Choose your favourite looks.

headlines.title: How Aldi is taking on US supermarkets with its $4 almond butter
headlines.description: The German supermarket's $9bn US push targets urban hubs like Manhattan. Can its discount model match Walmart?

headlines.title: People flee as Russian strike hits near Ukraine coffee shop
headlines.description: Three cameras caught the moment people ducked then ran for cover in Sumy, in north eastern Ukraine.

headlines.title: Ann Widdecombe murder probe: What we know so far
headlines.description: The former MP was found dead at her home in Haytor, Devon, on Thursday morning.

headlines.title: Village in shock as 'horrific' Ann Widdecombe murder case unfolds
headlines.description: The residents of a tiny Devon village are left in shock after the death of Ann Widdecombe.

headlines.title: China evacuates nearly two million people as powerful typhoon makes landfall
headlines.description: Schools, work and outdoor activities have been suspended in Zhejiang province and many transport services cancelled.

headlines.title: Champion Sinner wary of Zverev before Wimbledon final
headlines.description: Recent history suggests Jannik Sinner should be confident of retaining his Wimbledon title - but he is wary of French Open champion Alexander Zverev.

headlines.title: How a viral seal called Neil caused mayhem in Australia
headlines.description: The five-year-old elephant seal attracted global attention during his recent time ashore in southern Tasmania.

headlines.title: 'Fresh arrest in killing of Widdecombe' and 'Saved by the Bell'
headlines.description: New arrest after death of Ann Widdecombe and Bellingham brings it home for England leads Sunday's papers.

headlines.title: My son's ultra-rare diagnosis took eight years
headlines.description: Ben struggled to feed, failed to reach developmental milestones and had surgery to remove cataracts.

headlines.title: Berlin Wall in garden breaches planning rules
headlines.description: Steven Thorpe is told he has breached planning rules by installing a chunk of the wall by his house.

headlines.title: Artist sells garbage collected outside Taylor Swift's wedding
headlines.description: The cubes of trash artist Justin Gignac called "Pocket Garbage" were priced at $25 (£18) and $100 (£74), and sold out online.

headlines.title: Women-only gig group grows to 700 members
headlines.description: The Girly Gig Army allows women to go to events together in Eastbourne, Hastings and Brighton.
